rulings.Case Title: JOHN SULLIVAN VS. SAN FRANCISCO BOARD OF APPEALS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion In Support Of Defendants Motion To Expunge Notice Of Pendency Of Action; For Alternative Motion To Order Plaintiffs To Post An Undertaking; And For Attorneys Fees
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 11, 2019 line 1. DEFENDANT MICHAEL KRAMER*, ALEX SHVARTSMAN*, MARK SHVARTSMAN*, MICHAEL LUSTBADER* Notice Of Motion And Motion In Support Of Defendants Motion To Expunge Notice Of Pendency Of Action; For Alternative Motion To Order Plaintiffs To Post An Undertaking; And For Attorneys Fees OFF CALENDAR per request of the moving party. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: ANA MACDONALD VS. DUKE PARTNERS, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION / Notice Of Motion And Motion To Modify Payments Due Under Order Entered January 24, 2017
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 11, 2019 line 2. PLAINTIFF (CONSOLIDATED CASE) DUKE PARTNERS, LLC MOTION / Notice Of Motion And Motion To Modify Payments Due Under Order Entered January 24, 2017 GRANTED as follows: Starting on August 5, 2019 and each month thereafter until the resolution of this consolidated action, Ana Macdonald shall post with the Court $4,500. = (501/CFH)
